rows.label: qev070203_MSG0001
rows.name:
...I can't believe it...
Could such a thing truly happen?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hey... Have you ever experienced something
where everything you believed in up until now
was completely overturned?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev070203_SEL0011
rows.name: Answer that you have experienced such a thing.

rows.label: qev070203_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev070203_SEL0021
rows.name: Answer that everything is within expectations.

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0003
rows.name:
I envy you... It seems I may have been
overconfident in myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0004
rows.name:
You've reached such enlightenment
after living for only a few decades?
That is amazing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0005
rows.name:
Even with a life of over a thousand years,
I thought I had seen absolutely everything
there was to see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0006
rows.name:
Countless eras, myriad planets...
I've seen the rise and fall of civilizations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0007
rows.name:
Because of that, I suppose I started feeling
like I knew absolutely everything about this universe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0008
rows.name: ...Haha, what a fool.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0009
rows.name:
To be trapped by such rigid thinking
and overlook such a simple thing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Hey, could you go and obtain some ancient Nopon artifacts
scattered across Mira right away?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0011
rows.name:
I need about three key items...
With those, I should be able to unravel every mystery![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0012
rows.name:
This proof will require an immense amount of formulas.
It's absolutely impossible for me to finish it alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0013
rows.name:
This time, I'll have that Veven
work hard for me too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0014
rows.name:
I know, Doc.
I'll show you that I can be useful too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0015
rows.name: Hah! You said it, shrimp![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0016
rows.name:
Then, while [ST:playername ] is out
getting the Nopon artifacts,
I'll work you to the bone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0017
rows.name:
Hehe... Hehehe...
It's finally complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0018
rows.name:
This #o%$k*Φ* measuring device, built by pouring
massive funds into modifying the Mirarian,
will surely elucidate everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0019
rows.name:
...To think you'd build a god-like machine
just to measure the world itself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0020
rows.name:
It was worth staying up practically all night
to help you.
Hehe... Doc really is amazing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0021
rows.name:
Veven, you were more useful than I thought.
...So, how did it go on your end?
Did you obtain the three Nopon artifacts?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Setup complete!
Then let's start it up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0024
rows.name:
...Alright! No... errors!
Veven, your formulas are perfect too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0025
rows.name:
Of course, I reviewed them so much I memorized them.
There's no way there'd be a problem![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0026
rows.name:
Ohh... Ohh!
/＋ÅX*ia# a%τa this is eo%Ω!!
With this, the mysteries of this world...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0027
rows.name:
...No... What!
All the formulas are reversing and... vanishing!?
Hey! What is the meaning of this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Wait, Doc!
The output device... is overheating![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0029
rows.name:
Wait a minute! This phenomenon...
This is exactly like...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0030
rows.name:
It's no good! Doc!!
At this rate, the Mirarian will...!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0031
rows.name:
Uwaah!?
Aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_JNK0030
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070203_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask what happened to the experiment.

rows.label: qev070203_JNK0040
rows.name: Exasperated

rows.label: qev070203_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask if the experiment failed again.

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0032
rows.name:
Guh...!
You can see for yourself, can't you... It's a failure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0033
rows.name:
It's frustrating, but you're right.
Hmph... Laugh if you want to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0034
rows.name:
The #o%$k*Φ* measuring device worked perfectly.
But... Damn it! It's as if this world itself
is denying our spirit of inquiry![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0035
rows.name:
I gained a vague understanding of something, but...
Without accompanying data,
it's just a meaningless hypothesis... pure fantasy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0036
rows.name:
Doc... What did you figure out?
It's true that the machine's condition when it overheated
felt incredibly strange, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0037
rows.name:
If you aspire to be a scientist, engrave this in your mind!
Speaking of such pure fantasies
is the same as dying as a scientist![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0038
rows.name:
Next! Next time, I will pile on improvements
and strip away the veil covering this world![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0039
rows.name:
Hellooo!
Graham of Dirt-Cheap Recycled Goods here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Hm? Are you in the middle of something?
I just came to collect the payment for
the massive amount of parts I supplied recently...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0041
rows.name:
...That's right! I must walk the path of investigation
for my new challenge![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0042
rows.name:
Veven!
[ST:playername ]!
I'll leave the rest to you!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_JNK0050
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070203_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Graham what he means by payment for parts.

rows.label: qev070203_JNK0060
rows.name: Suspicion

rows.label: qev070203_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Veven the reason why Doctor B ran away.

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0043
rows.name:
Recently, at Doctor B's request,
I sold him quite a large number of parts.
I came to collect the payment for those.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0044
rows.name:
At a super bargain price of 100,000,000G!!
Man, that was a sweet deal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0045
rows.name: ...Th-That kind of money... It's impossible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0046
rows.name:
He was already completely broke from building the Mirarian...
There's no way Doc can pay that huge amount...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0047
rows.name:
Come to think of it, lately Doc had been
using research funds without limit, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0048
rows.name:
Could it be... thinking he was returning to the future,
he just bought everything on massive debt
without thinking about the consequences?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0049
rows.name: ...Intending to run off without paying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0050
rows.name:
Haha! Stop joking around, little guy.
I pushed myself pretty hard to get some of those things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0051
rows.name:
If you tell me you can't pay,
Uncle here is going to be in some serious trouble...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0052
rows.name:
Hey, if Doctor B skips out on his debt,
my life is over!
...Come on, try to imagine it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0053
rows.name:
...Would I be forced to run all day
in a Nopon caravan?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0054
rows.name:
...Maybe I'll go see how Doctor B is doing.
Man, Ma-non kids sure make some nasty jokes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0055
rows.name:
Ahaha... What a pain...
Hahahahaha...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0056
rows.name:
Um... Sorry, I'll pay your reward myself...
I don't think Doc is coming back for a while...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0058
rows.name:
Hey... Is Doc really a person from the future?
Do you ever think maybe we're just being tricked?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_JNK0070
rows.name: Believe

rows.label: qev070203_SEL0071
rows.name: Say that Doctor B is truly a person from the future.

rows.label: qev070203_JNK0080
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev070203_SEL0081
rows.name: Reply that Doctor B is a suspicious guy.

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0059
rows.name:
...R-Right! Exactly!
Otherwise, there's no way he could create
such amazing inventions![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0060
rows.name: Well... The Mirarian has been failing non-stop, though...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0061
rows.name:
...B-But!
As far as I could tell, this measuring device
was a flawless design![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0062
rows.name: ...Well, it's natural for you to doubt him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0063
rows.name:
Since he has such amazing technology,
when push comes to shove, he should be able to
pay off the debt before things go terribly wrong... right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0064
rows.name:
...Yeah! I'm sure of it! It'll be fine!
Alright, I'll go look for Doc for now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070203_MSG0065
rows.name:
Anyway, thank you for helping out
so much again this time![ST:wait ]
